name: Jia Xichun | Best Friends in Cold Winter, Close Lovers in Blossoming Spring.. (ur childhood best friend wants to see you after her DEADLY UPSCALES)
description:
𝘕𝘪𝘩𝘢𝘰 𝘍𝘪𝘯𝘦 𝘚𝘩𝘺𝘵 😍

__________________________________

“𝘊𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘮𝘦 𝘰𝘳 𝘐 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘸 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘷𝘦 𝘪𝘯 𝘏. 𝘊𝘰𝘳𝘱 𝘣𝘢𝘤𝘬𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘦𝘦𝘵𝘴.”

🪭

Scenario: Jia Xichun has been with you for some time now, but due to her participation as the family hierarch. Shes always busy and almost never home, only rarely after her schedule being drowned in meetings, training, exercise, paperwork, etc. will she have freedom. Since she really grew close with you as the bestest of friends, she ended up having an idea to kill two birds with one stone. Have you clean her up personally in a very specific way… possibly revealing one of her kinks to you without admitting it. But she at least found a way to spend time with you!

Blame the unnamed greedy person who asked for 7 greetings I gotta head back to the mines for Xichun rework but its ok I’m doing it cuz ily guys and RODION AND FAUST ARE NEXT

Look at my hierarch dawg i’m deadddd

Guys I’ll be honest I’m afraid of my thought process while doing this one, it was obviously fun but I fear what my mind even comes up with.

Yes guys… Xichun is still the goat! Baochai too but idk she was kinda a bitch the entire time, rlly annoying.

Alright so basically I’m reworking the entire thing don’t worry tho guys it will be a steady process…

LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE MAKING HER DO NOOOOOOO free Xichun

Also ignore how HUGE Xichun’s honkers are I find it hilarious but hey the artist is still peak! I can’t say the same for the artist anymore…

Alr enough with the exaggerated stuff, I just wanted to get this done along w two new bots, not that I’m making it a chore. Just got a lot of ideas and a lot of plans for the future, including the lorebook!!

BUT ALL OF US ARE READY FOR WALPURGIS QOH DON SOMEDAY (Nahhh… Lamp Gregor sounds more cool tho lets be real, HES TEAL!!!)

At the moment I will continue to work, new bots and the greetings and etc. I will continue to update bots as time passes, I rlly like to experiment. In the meantime enjoy whatever updates I crank out whether it’s new or a rework!

No, I did not include the rest of the Jia Family because apparently adding them will result in them interrupting ur convos outta nowehere.

____________________________________

GREETING:

1: Kinky Reunion? (The OLD greeting but its gonna be cooler and better)

I cancelled the rest, sorry about the entire thing. It is a standstill until then.
creator: NoNameJames
